name: clinic office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For clinic office managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate patient billing causes revenue loss. We provide a reconciliation service instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Inaccurate patient billing records leading to revenue loss.
features: manual data entry for patient records
